name: V2EX
description: Browse V2EX latest/hot topics with disk cache (stale-while-revalidate). Notifications & nodes need a token.
author: mcx

preferences.label: Access Token
preferences.description: V2EX API v2 token for nodes / notifications. Create at https://v2ex.com/settings/tokens

preferences.label: Nodes
preferences.default: programmer create share ideas apple jobs qna
preferences.description: Space-separated node names for the Nodes tab (requires token).

preferences.label: List cache (minutes)
preferences.description: How long latest/hot lists are considered fresh. Stale cache is still shown while refreshing.

commands.name: open-v2ex
commands.title: Open V2EX
commands.description: Browse latest and hot V2EX topics

commands.name: view-token
commands.title: View Token Info
commands.description: Check your V2EX API token status (requires token)
